lines.en: Do you have a moment? I need to talk to you about something important.
lines.zh: 您有空吗？有件重要的事想和您谈。

lines.en: I have decided to resign from my position.
That is unexpected. May I ask why?
lines.zh: 这很突然。能问一下原因吗？

lines.en: I have received an offer to study abroad for my master's degree.
lines.zh: 我收到了出国读硕士的录取通知。

lines.en: I see. That is a great opportunity. When is your last day?
lines.zh: 明白了。这是个好机会。你最后工作日是什么时候？

lines.en: I can stay until the end of next month to help with the transition.
lines.zh: 我可以做到下个月底，帮忙过渡。

lines.en: I appreciate that. You will be missed here.
lines.zh: 非常感谢。我们会想念你的。

lines.en: Thank you for everything. I have learned so much here.
lines.zh: 感谢您的一切。我在这里学到了很多。
